name: Tangerine Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the first three ingredients thoroughly.
2. Press into the bottom and sides of an 8 x 3 spring form pan.
3. Bake for 5 minutes at 350 degrees (preheat oven).
4. Turn the oven off and let it cool in the oven for 45 minutes.
5. Preheat the oven to 250 degrees.
6. In a large mixer bowl, place one package of cream cheese and one egg; beat thoroughly.
7. Repeat with remaining cream cheese and eggs, beating well after each addition.
8. Gradually add sugar alternately with juice while continuing to beat.
9. Beat at medium speed for 10 minutes.
10. Stir in the grated tangerine peel.
11. Pour into crust and bake for 25 minutes.
12. Turn off the heat and let the cake stand in the oven for another 45 minutes before removing it from the pan.
13. Preheat the oven to 350 degrees.
14. Thoroughly combine the topping ingredients.
15. Let the topping stand at room temperature.
16. Gently spread over the warm cake.
17. Return to the preheated oven for an additional 10 minutes.
18. Cool partially on a wire rack and refrigerate overnight, if possible.
